ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  HMT Limited announced a change in its senior management, with Shri S.K. Kadbe, General Manager (FPA), superannuating (retiring) on June 30, 2026. This is a routine, planned departure for a senior executive, unlikely to have immediate material negative impacts on the company's operations beyond the potential loss of institutional knowledge. No red flags are apparent in this standard regulatory disclosure.
